zones.title: Whole-Home Care
zones.description: Dusting of furniture, décor, and accessible surfaces; vacuuming carpets, rugs, and stairs; mopping hard floors with professional products; emptying trash and recycling bins; sanitizing high-touch surfaces such as doorknobs, switches, and remotes.

zones.title: Kitchen Detail
zones.description: Wiping down countertops and backsplash, cleaning and sanitizing sinks and faucets, exterior wipe-down of appliances (fridge, oven, microwave, dishwasher), cabinet fronts and handles wiped, and stove top degreased and polished.

zones.title: Bathroom Refresh
zones.description: Toilets, tubs, showers, and sinks scrubbed and disinfected; soap scum and water stains removed from tiles and glass; mirrors and fixtures polished streak-free; vanities, counters, and cabinet exteriors wiped.

zones.title: Bedrooms & Living Areas
zones.description: Beds made (with optional linen change on request); surfaces, dressers, and nightstands dusted; furniture exteriors wiped and spot-cleaned; living room surfaces, tables, and décor dusted and polished.

zones.title: Rotating Deep-Clean Tasks
zones.description: Different areas are tackled each week, including baseboards and molding, ceiling fans and light fixtures, air vents and return grates, cabinet fronts or interior touch-ups, and window sills and ledges.

topRight.title: Quick Facts
description: Recommended Frequency: Every week (best for maintaining a clean, stress-free household).
Duration: 2–4 hours depending on home size and condition.

middleRight.title: Service Highlights
description: Legendary Cleaning Rotating System keeps your home fresh and sanitized.
Weekly maintenance combined with rotating deep-cleaning tasks.
Ideal for busy households, families, and pet owners.

bottomRight.title: What’s Not Included
description: Post-construction cleanup.
Carpet shampooing or steam cleaning (available separately).
Wall and ceiling washing.
Full appliance interiors (unless added on).

bottomMiddle.title: Pro Tips & Benefits
description: Declutter counters and surfaces before your appointment to maximize results.
Use weekly service for upkeep, and pair with seasonal deep cleaning for a like-new feel year-round.
Provide entry instructions if you won’t be home—we’ll handle everything securely.

bottomLeft.title: Optional Upgrades
description: Cleaning inside oven or refrigerator.
Changing linens.
Shutters and blinds refreshed.

topRight.title: Quick Facts
description: Recommended Frequency: Every 2 weeks (bi-monthly) — perfect for households that don’t require weekly service but still want consistent maintenance.

middleRight.title: Service Highlights
description: Legendary Cleaning Rotating System keeps your home consistently maintained.

description: Post-construction cleanup.

description: Tidy up and declutter surfaces before each visit to maximize efficiency.

zones.description: Wiping and sanitizing of sinks, countertops, appliance exteriors, toilets, tubs, showers, and mirrors for a fresh reset in the most used spaces.

zones.title: Living Areas & Bedrooms
zones.description: Dusting of furniture and accessible surfaces, plus vacuuming and mopping of all floors to quickly refresh shared and personal spaces.

zones.title: General Touch-Ups
zones.description: Wiping down light switches, door handles, and visible smudges, with quick detailing to ensure a polished finish throughout the home.

topRight.title: Quick Facts

description: Perfect for special occasions or guest visits.
Targets the most essential, high-impact areas.
Quick and efficient cleaning without a recurring commitment.

bottomRight.title: What’s Not Included

zones.title: Kitchen
zones.description: Degreasing and sanitizing of countertops, sinks, stovetops, and appliance exteriors. Cabinet fronts are wiped down and detailed, with optional cleaning of interior appliances such as oven, microwave, or refrigerator.

zones.title: Bathrooms
zones.description: Scrubbing and disinfecting of toilets, tubs, showers, sinks, and tile. Mirrors, fixtures, and faucets polished streak-free, with deep removal of soap scum, hard water stains, and buildup.

zones.title: Living Areas & Bedrooms
zones.description: Detailed dusting of furniture, décor, blinds, vents, baseboards, and ceiling fans. Vacuuming and mopping of all floors, spot-cleaning visible marks on furniture exteriors, and making beds (with optional linen change).

zones.title: Hard-to-Reach Areas
zones.description: Cleaning behind accessible furniture, polishing fixtures and trim, and addressing neglected corners and detailed surfaces.

topRight.title: Quick Facts
description: Recommended Frequency: Every 3–6 months to prevent buildup, maintain freshness, and keep your home healthier between routine cleanings.
Duration: 4–8 hours depending on the size and condition of the home. Larger homes or those with heavy buildup may require additional time.

middleRight.title: Service Highlights
description: Comprehensive top-to-bottom reset of your home.
Targets hidden dirt, buildup, and neglected areas.
Perfect for seasonal refreshes, move-in/move-out, or pre-event preparation.

bottomRight.title: What’s Not Included
description: Post-construction cleanup.
Carpet shampooing or steam cleaning (separate service).
Wall or ceiling washing.
Furniture moving for oversized or heavy pieces.

bottomMiddle.title: Pro Tips & Benefits
description: Declutter surfaces before your appointment to maximize efficiency.
Point out any special requests or delicate items to the cleaning team.
Schedule before hosting guests, special occasions, or seasonal transitions.

bottomLeft.title: Optional Upgrades
description: Oven interior cleaning.
Refrigerator interior cleaning.
Linen changing.

zones.title: Whole-Home Care
zones.description: Deep dusting and polishing of baseboards, trim, vents, doors, and molding. Cleaning of air vents, light switches, and outlet covers. Streak-free glass and mirror cleaning. Sanitizing of high-touch areas such as doorknobs, remotes, and appliance handles.

zones.title: Kitchen Detail
zones.description: Degreasing and polishing of exterior appliances including fridge, oven, and microwave. Microwave interior and oven surface cleaned (if cool/empty). Cabinet exteriors wiped and detailed, and countertops and backsplash scrubbed and sanitized.

zones.title: Bathroom Refresh
zones.description: Removal of soap scum, hard water stains, and buildup. Deep scrubbing of toilets, tubs, and sinks. Polishing and disinfecting of fixtures, switches, and surfaces for a refreshed feel.

zones.title: Floors & Finishes
zones.description: Edge-to-edge vacuuming, including under accessible furniture. Professional mopping with proper floor-care products, plus spot-cleaning of visible marks on furniture exteriors.

topRight.title: Quick Facts
description: Recommended Frequency: Every 3–6 months for a consistently refreshed, well-maintained home.
Duration: 5–8 hours depending on home size and condition. Larger or heavily soiled homes may require additional time.

middleRight.title: Service Highlights
description: Transforms routine housekeeping into a luxury experience.
Reaches hidden corners and restores brilliance throughout your home.
Leaves your living space feeling refreshed, polished, and brand-new.

bottomRight.title: What’s Not Included
description: Carpet shampooing or steam cleaning.
Full fridge or oven interior cleaning.
Wall and ceiling washing.
Post-construction cleanup.

bottomMiddle.title: Pro Tips & Benefits
description: Declutter before your appointment to maximize results.
Best scheduled seasonally or before special events or guests.

bottomLeft.title: Optional Upgrades
description: Full oven interior cleaning.
Full refrigerator interior cleaning.
Special detailing for high-use rooms.

zones.title: Kitchen
zones.description: Cleaning and sanitizing of sinks, countertops, and backsplashes. Cabinet interiors and exteriors wiped down. Appliance exteriors cleaned, with optional interior oven and refrigerator cleaning. Microwave and dishwasher detailed on request.

zones.title: Bathrooms
zones.description: Scrubbing and disinfecting of toilets, tubs, showers, sinks, and tiles. Mirrors, fixtures, and faucets polished streak-free. Cabinet interiors and exteriors wiped down for a complete refresh.

zones.title: Living Areas & Bedrooms
zones.description: Dusting of all surfaces, furniture exteriors, vents, blinds, and baseboards. Vacuuming and mopping of all floors. Cleaning of ceiling fans, light fixtures, and switches for a move-in-ready feel.

zones.title: Detail Work
zones.description: Removal of dust and debris from shelves, closets, trim, and hard-to-reach corners. Doors, frames, and molding wiped down, with cobweb removal from ceilings and corners.

topRight.title: Quick Facts
description: Recommended Frequency: One-time service, typically scheduled before moving into a new home. Additional deep cleaning can be requested for vacant or long-unoccupied homes.
Duration: 6–10 hours depending on the size of the home, condition, and whether the space is empty or partially furnished.

middleRight.title: Service Highlights
description: Complete top-to-bottom reset for a fresh start in your new home.
Ideal for new builds, previously occupied, or long-vacant homes.
Ensures every room is deeply sanitized and move-in ready.

bottomRight.title: What’s Not Included
description: Furniture moving for large or heavy items.
Structural repairs or paint work.
Exterior landscaping or yard cleaning.

bottomMiddle.title: Pro Tips & Benefits
description: Schedule cleaning before movers arrive for the best results.
Request interior appliance and cabinet cleaning for the most complete reset.
Pair with carpet or window cleaning for a fully refreshed home.

bottomLeft.title: Optional Upgrades
description: Oven and refrigerator interior cleaning.
Window cleaning.
Carpet or upholstery cleaning.
Exterior surface washing for entryways or patios.

zones.title: Deep Cleaning Methods
zones.description: Steam Cleaning (Hot Water Extraction) is the most powerful method for deep cleaning, removing embedded dirt, stains, and allergens while refreshing carpet fibers. Low-moisture cleaning is a faster-drying method ideal for certain carpet types or situations requiring quick turnaround.

zones.title: Stain & Odor Treatment
zones.description: Specialized solutions neutralize pet odors and remove stains that target both the surface and underlying padding, with additional treatments available for severe cases.

zones.title: Furniture Handling
zones.description: Light furniture such as chairs, small tables, and end tables is carefully moved to clean beneath. Larger or heavy furniture like beds, sectionals, and entertainment centers is left in place for safety, though it can be pre-moved by the homeowner if desired.

zones.title: Professional Guidance
zones.description: Receive drying-time recommendations tailored to your home’s ventilation, along with post-cleaning care instructions to extend results.

topRight.title: Quick Facts
description: Recommended Frequency: Every 6–12 months depending on household conditions. Homes with pets, children, or high foot traffic benefit from cleaning every 6 months.
Duration: 2–4 hours for most standard homes. Larger homes or heavily soiled carpets may require more time.
Drying Times: Steam Cleaning 6–12 hours · Low-Moisture Cleaning 2–4 hours.

middleRight.title: Service Highlights
description: Safe handling of light furniture.
Professional stain & odor treatments.
Tailored cleaning methods for your carpet type.

bottomRight.title: What’s Not Included
description: Full furniture moving for heavy or oversized items.
Carpet replacement or repair services.
Water damage restoration (separate service).

bottomMiddle.title: Pro Tips & Benefits
description: Vacuum before your appointment for best results.
Use ceiling fans or HVAC to speed drying.
Schedule cleanings seasonally or before special events for fresher carpets.

bottomLeft.title: Optional Upgrades
description: Severe stain/odor treatments (on request).
Specialty solutions for pets & allergens.
Protective treatments to extend cleanliness.

zones.title: Interior & Exterior Glass Cleaning
zones.description: Removal of dirt, dust, smudges, and hard water spots for streak-free clarity inside and outside your windows.

zones.title: Frame & Sill Wipe-Down
zones.description: Cleaning of frames, tracks, and sills to remove dust, debris, and buildup, improving window function and appearance.

zones.title: Screen Cleaning
zones.description: Light washing or wiping of window screens to improve airflow, visibility, and overall freshness.

zones.title: Detail Work
zones.description: Careful cleaning of corners, edges, and hard-to-reach areas for a flawless, polished finish.

topRight.title: Quick Facts
description: Recommended Frequency: At least twice a year, typically in spring and fall. Homes in high-traffic, coastal, or wooded areas may benefit from more frequent service.
Duration: 2–5 hours depending on the number of windows, home size, and accessibility.

middleRight.title: Service Highlights
description: Streak-free shine inside and out.
Improves natural light and curb appeal.
Includes glass, frames, sills, and screens.

bottomRight.title: What’s Not Included
description: Glass repair or replacement.
Removal of paint, construction adhesives, or permanent damage (offered as add-ons).
Roof or solar panel cleaning.

bottomMiddle.title: Pro Tips & Benefits
description: Schedule in spring to remove pollen and dust, and in fall to clear seasonal buildup.
Regular cleaning extends the life of glass, seals, and frames.
Combine with exterior surface washing for maximum curb appeal.

bottomLeft.title: Optional Upgrades
description: Paint or adhesive removal from glass surfaces.
Hard water stain deep treatment.
Bundle with gutter or exterior surface cleaning for full exterior care.

zones.title: Deep Cleaning
zones.description: Comprehensive cleaning of kitchens, bathrooms, bedrooms, and living areas. Includes baseboards, fixtures, and hard-to-reach areas for a full interior reset.

zones.title: Carpet Cleaning
zones.description: Choice of steam cleaning or low-moisture method. Removes embedded dirt, stains, allergens, and odors to refresh and sanitize carpets.

zones.title: Window Washing
zones.description: Interior and exterior glass cleaned for a streak-free shine. Includes screens, frames, tracks, and sills for a complete finish.

topRight.title: Quick Facts
description: Recommended Frequency: As needed for move-ins/outs, seasonal resets, holiday/event prep, or after renovations.
Duration: 6–10 hours in a single visit depending on home size and condition. Larger homes may require additional time or extra technicians.

middleRight.title: Service Highlights
description: Combines three of our most popular services in one visit.
Saves $100 compared to booking separately.
Provides the ultimate top-to-bottom reset for your home.

bottomRight.title: What’s Not Included
description: Upholstery, tile, or exterior surface cleaning (available as add-ons).
Large debris or post-construction waste removal.
Repairs to flooring, windows, or fixtures.

bottomMiddle.title: Pro Tips & Benefits
description: Schedule before holidays, events, or move-in/out days for maximum impact.
Pair with upholstery or tile cleaning add-ons for an even more complete refresh.
Enjoy the convenience of a single-day reset instead of multiple appointments.

bottomLeft.title: Optional Upgrades
description: Upholstery cleaning to refresh furniture fabrics.
Tile and grout cleaning for kitchens and bathrooms.
Exterior surface washing for patios, siding, or driveways.

zones.title: Deep Cleaning
zones.description: Comprehensive cleaning of kitchens, bathrooms, bedrooms, and living areas. Includes dusting, sanitizing, and detail work on surfaces, fixtures, and hard-to-reach areas.

zones.title: Carpet Cleaning
zones.description: Steam or low-moisture cleaning options remove dirt, stains, allergens, and odors while refreshing carpet fibers for a healthier, fresher home.

topRight.title: Quick Facts
description: Recommended Frequency: Every 6–12 months, especially in homes with kids, pets, or high traffic. Also ideal for seasonal resets or post-event cleanups.
Duration: 4–8 hours depending on home size, number of rooms, and carpet condition.

middleRight.title: Service Highlights
description: Combines two essential services in one visit.
Saves $75 compared to booking separately.
Delivers both spotless interiors and refreshed carpets.

bottomRight.title: What’s Not Included
description: Upholstery, tile, or window cleaning (available as add-ons).
Carpet replacement or repair of damaged flooring.
Removal of heavy furniture or large appliances.

bottomMiddle.title: Pro Tips & Benefits
description: Move fragile or personal items off carpets before service.
Keep pets secured in a safe space during cleaning.
Use drying aids like fans or HVAC circulation to speed carpet drying.

bottomLeft.title: Optional Upgrades
description: Upholstery cleaning for sofas and chairs.
Tile and grout cleaning for kitchens and bathrooms.
Window washing to complete the refresh.

zones.title: Deep Cleaning
zones.description: Comprehensive interior cleaning of kitchens, bathrooms, bedrooms, and living areas. Includes dusting, sanitizing, baseboards, fixtures, and hard-to-reach areas.

zones.title: Window Washing
zones.description: Interior and exterior glass cleaned for a streak-free shine. Includes screens, tracks, and sills for a complete finish that enhances light and curb appeal.

topRight.title: Quick Facts
description: Recommended Frequency: Best scheduled for seasonal cleanings (spring/fall), pre-event preparation, or holiday refreshes.
Duration: 4–8 hours depending on home size, number of windows, and detailing needs.

middleRight.title: Service Highlights
description: Combines two popular services in one convenient visit.
Saves $75 compared to booking separately.
Provides a spotless home interior and streak-free windows inside and out.

bottomRight.title: What’s Not Included
description: Carpet, upholstery, or tile cleaning (available as add-ons).
Paint removal or correction of permanent hard water stains (requires extra treatment).
Windows inaccessible due to safety or structural restrictions.

bottomMiddle.title: Pro Tips & Benefits
description: Clear items from window sills, ledges, and nearby furniture before service.
Provide access for both interior and exterior windows (unlock gates if needed).
Move fragile décor away from windows to avoid accidents.
Secure pets away from work areas for safety.

bottomLeft.title: Optional Upgrades
description: Carpet or upholstery cleaning to complete your reset.
Tile and grout cleaning for kitchens and bathrooms.
Exterior surface washing to enhance curb appeal.

zones.title: Carpet Cleaning
zones.description: Choice of steam (hot water extraction) or low-moisture cleaning methods. Removes dirt, allergens, odors, and refreshes carpet fibers for a healthier home.

zones.title: Window Washing
zones.description: Interior and exterior glass cleaned for a streak-free shine. Tracks, sills, and screens detailed for improved airflow and clarity.

topRight.title: Quick Facts
description: Recommended Frequency: Every 6–12 months, especially before hosting guests, during seasonal resets, or anytime you want a refreshed home inside and out.
Duration: 3–6 hours depending on number of windows, carpeted rooms, and overall home size.

middleRight.title: Service Highlights
description: Combines carpet cleaning and window washing in one efficient visit.
Saves $50 compared to booking separately.
Refreshes both interior comfort and exterior curb appeal.

bottomRight.title: What’s Not Included
description: Deep cleaning, upholstery, or tile (available as add-ons).
Removal of permanent carpet stains or heavy water damage.
Inaccessible exterior windows beyond safe reach.

bottomMiddle.title: Pro Tips & Benefits
description: Clear carpets of toys, décor, and small items before the appointment.
Move lightweight furniture if possible to maximize carpet coverage.
Open blinds and curtains for faster window access.
Secure pets and ensure parking and water access for technicians.

bottomLeft.title: Optional Upgrades
description: Add upholstery cleaning for sofas and chairs.
Bundle with deep cleaning for a complete reset.
Protective carpet treatment to extend cleanliness and durability.
